string: Lemtel AI Phone needs microphone access to make and receive calls.
Lemtel AI Phone uses the camera for video calls and profile photos.
Lemtel AI Phone reads your contacts so you can dial them faster and see caller names.
Lemtel AI Phone uses speech recognition to power AVA live transcription and assist.
Lemtel AI Phone uses notifications for incoming calls, missed calls, voicemails and messages.
Lemtel AI Phone uses your local network to connect to the SIP server.
Use Face ID to quickly and securely unlock Lemtel AI Phone.
